name: tc-upward-killed
description: The standard package layout — `{package.json, src/**}` with the suite tiers under `tests/` — whose source imports `../package.json` from inside `src/`. Scanned at `src/`, the gate must root Stryker's sandbox at this package root so that upward import resolves, mutate only `src/`, and judge mutants by the colocated suite alone. Every mutant is caught.
